title: Pakistani airstrikes kill dozens in eastern Afghanistan
summary_full: Pakistan says strikes were aimed at a terrorist group while Taliban condemn ‘cowardly act of aggression’Pakistani airstrikes in three eastern provinces of Afghanistan killed 36 civilians and wounded 163 others, Afghan officials have said, as attacks between the two countries showed no sign of abating.Pakistan’s information minister, Attaullah Tarar, said the operations on Sunday night were aimed at a terrorist group that his country blamed for a deadly militant attack in Karachi that killed three security personnel over the weekend. Continue reading...
